profile.who_we_are_p1: PT Geoinhance Solusi Rekayasa is a professional company specializing in geotechnical engineering and civil engineering technology, providing accurate, reliable, and science-based engineering solutions to support safe and sustainable infrastructure development.
profile.who_we_are_p2: We started this business in 2019 and officially established the company in 2025. We act as a strategic technical partner in addressing complex ground and structural challenges. By integrating field experience, advanced numerical analysis, and compliance with national and international standards, Geoinhance ensures that every engineering decision taken is technically precise, efficient, and accountable.
profile.office_desc: Operational management center, Geotechnical Big Data integration, and quality control system for the GeoINHance web application.
profile.vision_desc: To become the most trusted provider of geotechnical engineering and civil technology solutions, delivering safe, innovative, and sustainable infrastructure that meets national and international standards.
profile.mission_desc: Our Strategic Steps and Real Commitment
profile.mission_1: Providing accurate and reliable geotechnical consulting services.
profile.mission_3: Developing competent human resources through training.
profile.mission_4: Conducting high-quality geotechnical investigations & laboratory testing.
profile.mission_5: Building long-term partnerships with clients and stakeholders.
profile.mission_6: Implementing HSE (Health, Safety, an Environment), quality, and anti-bribery management systems.
profile.expertise_p1: GeoINHance possesses strong expertise in advanced geotechnical analysis, including 2D and 3D Finite Element Method (FEM), numerical modeling, seismic response analysis, and ground stability assessments.
profile.expertise_p2: These capabilities allow us to realistically evaluate soil-structure interactions, even on high-risk projects with challenging geological conditions.
profile.approach_p1: We believe that effective engineering solutions must be technically robust, practical, and project-target oriented. Therefore, our services are delivered through an integrated and personalized approach.
profile.approach_p2: The entire process is supported by single-gate communication through a dedicated Project Manager to ensure the highest quality standards, occupational safety, and timely project completion.
profile.commitment_p1: With extensive experience across various infrastructure sectors such as toll roads, bridges, ports, airports, railways, buildings, and energy facilities, GeoINHance is fully committed to being a strategic technical partner through three main pillars:
profile.card_01_desc: Enhancing the quality of engineering decision-making in a precise, accurate, and science-based manner.
profile.card_02_desc: Minimizing construction risks and mitigating complex soil stability and geotechnical issues directly in the field.
profile.card_03_desc: Fully supporting the development of resilient national infrastructure, prioritizing high safety aspects, and long-term sustainability.
profile.commitment_footer: In line with the company's core vision, we continue to strengthen our technical capabilities, human resource development, and technological innovation. This step goes hand in hand with our consistency in implementing Occupational Health and Safety (OHS) principles, environmental protection, and good corporate governance.

home.serv_1_desc: We will provide a dedicated Project Manager for our valuable clients.
home.serv_2_desc: Providing technical and analytical reports customized based on your project specifications.
home.serv_3_desc: Customize remuneration based on the Company Budget & Government Regulations.
home.serv_4_desc: We always listen and support our clients' needs to provide integrated and flexible solutions.
home.serv_5_desc: We continuously improve our capability and competence so our clients can focus on their business operations.
home.net_desc: Multi-office synergy to ensure fast and efficient technical team mobility across Indonesia's infrastructure corridors.
home.net_jkt_desc: Strategic operational hub for regulatory coordination, SOE partnerships, and national-scale project management.
home.net_bdg_desc: Geotechnical data computing center, structural modeling analysis studio, and main soil mechanics testing laboratory.
home.net_sub_desc: Eastern Indonesia field investigation services, including hydrographic surveys and maritime geophysical mapping.
home.net_bali_desc: Tactical command post handling UAV surveys, infrastructure corridor aerial mapping, and real-time geotechnical monitoring for the new capital (IKN).

fem.title: 3D FEM Analysis
fem.description: Portfolio of continuum mechanics modeling using Three-Dimensional Finite Element Method (3D FEM). Focusing on advanced stress-strain simulation, fatigue analysis, and material failure in non-standard structural components.
portfolio.empty: No 3D FEM projects match the filter criteria.
project.1.title: Crack & Fatigue Analysis of Power Plant Turbine Base Plate
project.1.desc: Evaluation of extreme cyclic stress distribution on high-speed turbine engine foundations using 3D solid finite element modeling to predict microcrack initiation.
project.2.title: 3D FEM Blast Load Impact Simulation on Military Storage Facilities
project.2.desc: Analysis of shock wave propagation due to internal blast loads. Modeling includes the non-linear behavior of concrete and steel materials at high strain rates (strain rate effects).
ded.title: Detailed Engineering Design (DED)
ded.description: Portfolio of detailed engineering design for upper and lower structures of massive buildings, including digital modeling, dynamic load calculation, and ready-to-work technical documents.
portfolio.empty_ded: No DED projects match the filter criteria.
project.ded.1.title: Gedung Gelanggang Inovasi Kreativitas (GIK) UGM
project.ded.1.desc: Detailed Engineering Design (DED) for wide-span multi-story superstructures. Analysis focuses on the optimization of iconic steel roof trusses.
project.ded.2.title: PTN Hospital Universitas Hasanuddin
project.ded.2.desc: Preparation of structural engineering details for high-rise healthcare facility buildings. Technical planning includes full ductility of lateral load-resisting systems.
geotech.title: Geotechnical Analysis
geotech.description: Portfolio of comprehensive soil investigation, advanced soil parameter interpretation, settlement analysis, and soft ground improvement planning to ensure infrastructure foundation safety.
portfolio.empty_geotech: No Geotechnical Analysis projects match the filter criteria.
project.geotech.1.title: Soft Soil Improvement Analysis using PVD & Vacuum Consolidation Method
project.geotech.1.desc: Design of consolidation acceleration for soft clay soil using Prefabricated Vertical Drain (PVD) combined with a vacuum pressure system to accelerate settlement in reclamation construction.
project.geotech.2.title: Deep Soil Investigation Interpretation for Skyscraper Buildings
project.geotech.2.desc: Soil stratigraphy evaluation based on correlation of CPTu, N-SPT, and advanced laboratory testing data (Triaxial & Consolidation test) to determine design parameters for large-diameter bored pile foundations.
plaxis.title: Numerical Analysis Plaxis 3D
plaxis.description: Portfolio of advanced geotechnical modeling, 3-dimensional finite element analysis (FEA) for soil-structure interaction, deep excavation slope stability, and deformation behavior of complex foundation systems.
portfolio.empty_plaxis: No Plaxis 3D projects match the filter criteria.
project.plaxis.1.title: Deformation Analysis of Deep Basement Excavation & Secant Pile Stability
project.plaxis.1.desc: Simulation of excavation stages (staged construction) to predict lateral displacement of retaining walls and soil heave effects in dense urban areas.
project.plaxis.2.title: Bored Pile Group Analysis & Bridge Abutment Settlement Effects
project.plaxis.2.desc: Behavior study of pile group foundations under combined axial and lateral loads in thick soft soil layers to evaluate efficiency factors and long-term settlement.
numerical.title: Numerical Modelling Analysis
numerical.description: Portfolio of advanced computer-based simulations for complex physical phenomena, including computational fluid dynamics (CFD), thermal transfer analysis, and multi-physics coupling.
portfolio.empty_numerical: No Numerical Modelling projects match the filter criteria.
project.numerical.1.title: CFD Simulation of Main Dam Spillway Hydraulic Flow
project.numerical.1.desc: Analysis of hydraulic water behavior passing through the spillway channel to map cavitation potential, wall freeboard height, and the efficiency of the stilling basin in dissipating water kinetic energy.
project.numerical.2.title: Thermal Stress & Heat Transfer Analysis of Refinery Distillation Pipelines
project.numerical.2.desc: Numerical coupled modeling (coupled thermal-structural analysis) to evaluate thermal expansion and residual stress on high-temperature fluid piping systems to prevent fatigue failure.
review.title: Review Design Analysis
review.description: Portfolio of forensic audits, third-party independent evaluations, and structural residual load capacity assessments on existing buildings and infrastructure to guarantee long-term operational feasibility.
portfolio.empty_review: No Review Design projects match the filter criteria.
project.review.1.title: Forensic Audit & Load Capacity Design Review of Office Tower
project.review.1.desc: A comprehensive independent post-construction assessment to verify the capacity of existing beam-column elements against the latest seismic regulation updates of SNI 1726.
project.review.2.title: Third-Party Peer Review of Steel Truss Arch Bridge
project.review.2.desc: Parallel computing review using finite element modeling to analyze critical deflection points and hanger cable tension for a 120-meter span bridge.
slope.title: Slope Stability Analysis
slope.description: Portfolio of stability analysis for natural and engineered slopes, design of soil reinforcement systems (soil nailing, retaining walls, geosynthetics), and landslide risk mitigation simulations on critical infrastructure.
portfolio.empty_slope: No Slope Stability projects match the filter criteria.
project.slope.1.title: Slope Stability Analysis & Soil Nailing Reinforcement Design for Toll Road
project.slope.1.desc: Design of a retaining wall combined with a soil nail anchor network to stabilize critical slopes at toll bridge approaches after massive deformation.
project.slope.2.title: Mechanical Retaining Wall (MSE Wall) Design & Slope Safety Factor Evaluation
project.slope.2.desc: Stability analysis of vertical embankment slopes using geogrid reinforcement (Mechanically Stabilized Earth Wall) to verify internal and external Factor of Safety (FoS) values.
structural.title: Structural Analysis
structural.description: Portfolio of advanced numerical modeling, linear & non-linear analysis (P-Delta, Pushover, Time History), and finite element analysis (FEA) to verify structural safety and material efficiency.
portfolio.empty_structural: No Structural Analysis projects match the filter criteria.
project.structural.1.title: Non-Linear Seismic Analysis (Pushover) of a 25-Story Apartment Tower
project.structural.1.desc: Simulation of progressive collapse in reinforced concrete structures to map plastic hinge distribution and building deformation capacity curves during strong earthquakes.
project.structural.2.title: Reliability Evaluation & Finite Element Analysis (FEA) of Stadium Roof Truss
project.structural.2.desc: Micro-element analysis using solid modeling to evaluate stress concentrations at bolt connections of node plates for extreme long-span roofs.
staad_pro.hero.title: STAAD.Pro
staad_pro.hero.description: A powerful and integrated finite element analysis and design application. Analyze any structure exposed to static, dynamic, wind, earthquake, thermal, and moving loads.
staad_pro.benefits.project_type_desc: Versatile design for buildings, culverts, plants, bridges, stadiums, and marine structures.
staad_pro.benefits.auto_loading_desc: Reduces hours by automating forces from gravity, wind, earthquakes, snow, or vehicles.
staad_pro.benefits.global_standards_desc: Easily accommodate global requirements including U.S., European, Indian, Chinese, and Japanese codes.
staad_pro.features.section_subtitle: Equipped with sophisticated visualization, an open architecture for heavy customization, and a 25-year track record of rock-solid reliability.
staad_pro.features.openstaad_desc: Extract STAAD data directly into custom programs or tools like Microsoft Word or Excel. Use OpenSTAAD to fully drive model creation, run analyses, and view results via your own tailored macro interfaces.
staad_pro.features.cad_desc: Import CAD models in DXF formats seamlessly to use as base wireframes, structural grids, or outlines for complex decks that require robust finite element meshing. Exchange CIS/2 data with advanced steel design packages.
staad_pro.features.concrete_steel_desc: Access over 50 steel design codes globally. Enjoy integrated steel drawing production via Steel Autodrafter, or unlock full concrete design, detailing, and drawing production with specialized extensions.
staad_pro.features.nonlinear_desc: Export your structural analytical models directly to ADINA to solve highly sophisticated, complex, or extreme non-linear physical problems with high convergence stability.
staad_pro.variants.section_subtitle: Choose the variant that best suits your structural load complexity, seismic criteria, and project foundation integration.
staad_pro.variants.standard.title: STAAD.Pro
staad_pro.variants.standard.subtitle: Standard Core Edition
staad_pro.variants.standard.desc: A foundational solution for daily structural analysis using standard finite element analysis methods.
staad_pro.variants.advanced.title: STAAD.Pro Advanced
staad_pro.variants.advanced.subtitle: High-Performance & Non-Linear
staad_pro.variants.advanced.desc: Solves much more complex structural problems with super-fast computation speeds.
staad_pro.variants.advanced.bullet_1: All features of the STAAD.Pro version
staad_pro.variants.worksuite.title: Structural WorkSuite
staad_pro.variants.worksuite.subtitle: Complete Bundle System
staad_pro.variants.worksuite.desc: A comprehensive integrated package covering advanced analysis, foundation design, and specific steel connections.
staad_pro.contact.title: Ready to optimize your structural workflows?
staad_pro.contact.desc: STAAD.Pro can be purchased directly on Bentley's eStore or via Virtuosity. For consultations on your company's license implementation, contact our team immediately.
geostudio_flow.hero.description: Simulate complex heat and mass transfer processes in 2D or 3D. Solve groundwater and environmental challenges faster with software built for diverse geo-environmental conditions.
geostudio_flow.benefits.title: Solve Groundwater Challenges Faster
geostudio_flow.benefits.subtitle: Accommodate diverse environmental analysis needs ranging from earth dams, levees, excavations, to open pit mines.
geostudio_flow.benefits.b1_desc: Combine coupled or un-coupled physical processes involving groundwater flow, heat transfer, solute transport, gas, and air flow.
geostudio_flow.benefits.b2_desc: Rigorous mathematical formulations for complex problems, including non-linear saturated-unsaturated groundwater flow and phase change processes.
geostudio_flow.benefits.b3_desc: Leverage the Seequent ecosystem including Leapfrog and PLAXIS to share geometries and materials directly through cloud-based workflows.
geostudio_flow.modules.title: Integrated Numerical Technology
geostudio_flow.modules.subtitle: GeoStudio Flow is built on the foundation of legendary finite element analysis products for high-precision environmental modeling.
geostudio_flow.modules.m1_desc: Model groundwater flow in porous media. Handles simple steady-state saturated problems to complex transient saturated/unsaturated analysis with atmospheric coupling.
geostudio_flow.modules.m2_desc: Analyze heat transfer and phase change, from simple conduction to surface energy simulations with freeze-thaw cycles.
geostudio_flow.modules.m3_desc: Modeling solute movement and gas transfer in porous media, from diffusion-dominated to complex advection-dispersion systems with first-order reactions.
geostudio_flow.modules.m4_desc: Specifically designed for air transfer simulation in mine waste and other porous media, including coupled air-water interactions.
geostudio_flow.pricing.title: GeoStudio Flow Product Plans
geostudio_flow.pricing.subtitle: Choose the dimension modeling option that best fits the accuracy and geometry needs of your project's environmental challenges.
geostudio_flow.pricing.plan_2d.title: GeoStudio 2D Flow
geostudio_flow.pricing.plan_2d.subtitle: 2D Environmental Protection & Seepage
geostudio_flow.pricing.plan_2d.desc: A robust bundle for environmental protection modeling, groundwater flow, and ground freezing in two dimensions.
geostudio_flow.pricing.plan_3d.title: GeoStudio 3D Flow
geostudio_flow.pricing.plan_3d.subtitle: Comprehensive 3D Mass & Heat Solver
geostudio_flow.pricing.plan_3d.desc: Full extension to the 3D environment to handle complex geometries with mass transfer and forced convection formulations.
geostudio_flow.contact.title: Accelerate your geo-environmental projects today
geostudio_flow.contact.desc: GeoStudio Flow can be securely purchased via Bentley's eStore (Virtuosity) with a 12-month Named license option or corporate Shared licenses. Contact us to schedule a free software demo.
hero_description: Trusted Finite Element Software for Deformation, Groundwater Flow, and Stability Analysis in Geotechnical Engineering and Rock Mechanics.
about_p1: PLAXIS 2D is a two-dimensional finite-element (FE) program package specifically designed to analyze the deformation, consolidation, and stability behavior of soil and rock. Developed by Seequent (The Bentley Subsurface Company), this solution has become a global standard relied upon by leading consultants and international contractors.
about_p2: This software facilitates realistic stress and displacement evaluation through Staged Construction Mode. This feature allows users to activate or deactivate structural elements and soil clusters in each calculation phase according to actual field construction stages, such as in deep excavation, tunnel, or foundation simulations.
about_partner_note: As an official partner in Indonesia, PT GeoINHance Solusi Rekayasa is committed to providing original Seequent license procurement, continuous version updates, and professional technical support to optimize the design accuracy of your projects.
card_mesh_desc: Automatic generation of 6-node or 15-node triangular elements mesh to produce high-precision calculation convergence.
feature_1_desc: Flexible geometry modeling options to accommodate various cross-sectional types of geotechnical structures.
feature_2_desc: Staged simulation of actual construction phases to reflect the real sequence of work in the field.
pricing_desc: Choose the level of finite element computing capability that best suits the complexity of your project's geotechnical analysis.
edition_1_desc: Provides essential basic features for daily deformation analysis, slope stability, and standard safety analysis calculations for soil and rock.
edition_2_desc: Includes all basic edition features plus advanced computing functionalities for more specific geotechnical challenges.
edition_3_desc: The most complete edition for simulating dynamic environmental conditions & extreme external loads such as earthquakes and transient water.
feature_all_advanced: All features of the Advanced edition
edition_4_desc: Fully integrated bundle from Seequent to combine the power of multiple geotechnical software into a single unified license.
video_desc: Watch the geotechnical modeling workflow, automated mesh generation, and interactive visualization of soil deformation analysis results.
faq_desc: Common questions regarding licensing, system specifications, and PLAXIS 2D capabilities.
faq_1_a: PLAXIS 2D is a powerful and user-friendly two-dimensional finite-element (FE) program package for deformation and stability analysis in geotechnical engineering and rock mechanics. It is globally trusted by top-tier consultants and academic institutions in the civil engineering industry.
faq_2_a: PLAXIS 2D is used to solve a wide range of complex soil analysis challenges, ranging from retaining wall excavation projects, slope and embankment stability construction, onshore/offshore foundation bearing capacity calculations, to tunneling modeling, open-pit mining, and reservoir geomechanics.
faq_3_q: What is the difference between the various PLAXIS 2D products?
faq_3_intro: Computing capabilities are divided based on the following product edition tiers or SELECT entitlements:
faq_3_li1: PLAXIS 2D (Standard): Essential features for daily deformation and safety factor stability analysis (slope stability).
faq_3_li2: PLAXIS 2D Advanced: Adds creep functionality, coupled flow-deformation, and steady-state groundwater flow.
faq_3_li3: PLAXIS 2D Ultimate: The most comprehensive edition that unlocks dynamic/earthquake load analysis features and real-time transient groundwater level variations.
faq_3_li4: Geotechnical Analysis 2D WorkSuite: A comprehensive license bundle that integrates PLAXIS 2D Ultimate capabilities along with GeoStudio 2D Ultimate.
faq_4_q: What are the system requirements to run PLAXIS 2D?
faq_4_intro: To ensure the finite element computation process runs smoothly, the following computer hardware specifications are required:
faq_4_min_display: Screen resolution 1280 x 800 px or better
faq_4_rec_gpu: Nvidia GeForce or Quadro (min. 1 GB VRAM & 128-bit bus), or equivalent ATI/AMD solution
faq_5_q: How is PLAXIS 2D licensing and activation managed?
faq_5_a: PLAXIS 2D activation utilizes a cloud-based technology called Subscription Entitlement Service (SES ID) from Bentley. This system provides a universal ID to connect all activities within your Bentley applications. License entitlement management is handled directly at the user level, thereby **eliminating the need for manual activation keys or hardware dongles**. Users can also access personalized learning materials, learning history, and automatic product updates.
faq_6_q: Who develops PLAXIS 2D and what calculation method does it use?
faq_6_a: PLAXIS 2D is officially developed by Seequent (The Bentley Subsurface Company). The software is powered by robust and proven two-dimensional Finite Element Method (FEM) calculation procedures. This multi-core computational engine ensures reliable calculation convergence for both simple and complex models, and excels in analyzing settlement, thermal, groundwater flow, consolidation, and dynamic earthquake loads.
faq_7_q: Where can I get PLAXIS 2D training or professional support in Indonesia?
faq_7_a: As an official Seequent channel partner in Indonesia, PT GeoINHance Solusi Rekayasa provides comprehensive services including original Seequent license procurement, continuous version updates (SELECT entitlement), modeling technical troubleshooting assist, to officially certified geotechnical training courses to optimize the design accuracy of your projects.
contact_desc: Increase the efficiency of your infrastructure analysis with proven finite element accuracy. Consult annual corporate license schemes or institutional educational packages with our technical team.
p3d.hero_description: Trusted 3D Finite Element Software for Deformation, Groundwater Flow, and Stability Analysis in Geotechnical Engineering and Rock Mechanics.
p3d.about_p1: PLAXIS 3D is a three-dimensional finite-element (FE) program package specifically designed to analyze the deformation, consolidation, and stability behavior of soil and rock. Developed by Seequent (The Bentley Subsurface Company), this solution has become a global standard relied upon by leading consultants and international contractors for complex spatial geotechnical challenges.
p3d.about_p2: This software facilitates realistic stress and displacement evaluation through Staged Construction Mode in a full 3D environment. This feature allows users to activate or deactivate structural elements, volume hazards, and soil clusters in each calculation phase according to actual field construction stages, such as complex deep excavations, curved tunnels, or piled-raft foundation simulations.
p3d.about_partner_note: As an official partner in Indonesia, PT GeoINHance Solusi Rekayasa is committed to providing original Seequent license procurement, continuous version updates, and professional technical support to optimize the design accuracy of your projects.
p3d.card_mesh_desc: Automatic generation of 10-node tetrahedral volumetric elements mesh to produce high-precision calculation convergence in complex 3D geometries.
p3d.feature_1_desc: Advanced 3D geometry modeling options to accommodate complex, non-axisymmetric, and asymmetric geotechnical structures.
p3d.feature_2_desc: Staged simulation of actual construction phases to reflect the real sequence of work in the field.
p3d.pricing_desc: Choose the level of finite element computing capability that best suits the complexity of your project's geotechnical analysis.
p3d.edition_1_desc: Provides essential basic features for daily 3D deformation analysis, slope stability, and standard safety analysis calculations for soil and rock.
p3d.edition_2_desc: Includes all basic edition features plus advanced computing functionalities for more specific 3D geotechnical challenges.
p3d.edition_3_desc: The most complete edition for simulating dynamic environmental conditions & extreme external loads such as earthquakes and transient water in full 3D.
p3d.feature_all_advanced: All features of the Advanced edition
p3d.edition_4_desc: Fully integrated bundle from Seequent to combine the power of multiple geotechnical software into a single unified 3D license.
p3d.video_desc: Watch the 3D geotechnical modeling workflow, automated mesh generation, and interactive visualization of soil deformation analysis results.
p3d.faq_desc: Common questions regarding licensing, system specifications, and PLAXIS 3D capabilities.
p3d.faq_1_a: PLAXIS 3D is a powerful and user-friendly three-dimensional finite-element (FE) program package for deformation and stability analysis in geotechnical engineering and rock mechanics. It is globally trusted by top-tier consultants and academic institutions in the civil engineering industry.
p3d.faq_2_a: PLAXIS 3D is used to solve a wide range of complex soil analysis challenges that cannot be simplified into 2D, ranging from complex corner retaining wall excavations, asymmetrical slope and embankment constructions, large pile group or piled-raft foundations, to intersection tunneling modeling, open-pit mining, and reservoir geomechanics.
p3d.faq_3_intro: Computing capabilities are divided based on the following product edition tiers or SELECT entitlements:
p3d.faq_3_li1: PLAXIS 3D (Standard): Essential features for daily 3D deformation and safety factor stability analysis (slope stability).
p3d.faq_3_li2: PLAXIS 3D Advanced: Adds creep functionality, 3D coupled flow-deformation, and steady-state groundwater flow.
p3d.faq_3_li3: PLAXIS 3D Ultimate: The most comprehensive edition that unlocks 3D dynamic/earthquake load analysis features and real-time transient groundwater level variations.
p3d.faq_3_li4: Geotechnical Analysis 3D WorkSuite: A comprehensive license bundle that integrates PLAXIS 3D Ultimate capabilities along with GeoStudio 3D Ultimate.
p3d.faq_4_q: What are the system requirements to run PLAXIS 3D?
p3d.faq_4_intro: To ensure the 3D finite element computation process runs smoothly, the following computer hardware specifications are required:
p3d.faq_4_min_display: Screen resolution 1280 x 800 px or better
p3d.faq_4_rec_ram: 16 GB RAM or higher for complex 3D models
p3d.faq_4_rec_gpu: Nvidia GeForce or Quadro (min. 4 GB VRAM & 128-bit bus), or equivalent ATI/AMD solution
p3d.faq_5_q: How is PLAXIS 3D licensing and activation managed?
p3d.faq_5_a: PLAXIS 3D activation utilizes a cloud-based technology called Subscription Entitlement Service (SES ID) from Bentley. This system provides a universal ID to connect all activities within your Bentley applications. License entitlement management is handled directly at the user level, thereby **eliminating the need for manual activation keys or hardware dongles**. Users can also access personalized learning materials, learning history, and automatic product updates.
p3d.faq_6_q: Who develops PLAXIS 3D and what calculation method does it use?
p3d.faq_6_a: PLAXIS 3D is officially developed by Seequent (The Bentley Subsurface Company). The software is powered by robust and proven three-dimensional Finite Element Method (FEM) calculation procedures. This multi-core computational engine ensures reliable calculation convergence for both simple and complex models, and excels in analyzing settlement, thermal, groundwater flow, consolidation, and dynamic earthquake loads.
p3d.faq_7_q: Where can I get PLAXIS 3D training or professional support in Indonesia?
p3d.faq_7_a: As an official Seequent channel partner in Indonesia, PT GeoINHance Solusi Rekayasa provides comprehensive services including original Seequent license procurement, continuous version updates (SELECT entitlement), modeling technical troubleshooting assist, to officially certified geotechnical training courses to optimize the design accuracy of your projects.
p3d.contact_desc: Increase the efficiency of your infrastructure analysis with proven 3D finite element accuracy. Consult annual corporate license schemes or institutional educational packages with our technical team.
